# Off Piste Studio

> Web design and branding agency for small businesses. Based in Perth, WA, Australia. We build websites that generate leads for local service businesses — tradies, clinics, professional firms, and multi-location operators.

## Services

- [Website Design](https://offpistestudio.com/services/website-design): Custom website design for small businesses with lead forms, click-to-call, local SEO, and mobile-responsive layouts. Built to convert visitors into customers.
- [Local SEO](https://offpistestudio.com/services/local-seo): Google Business Profile setup, local citations, suburb pages, and Google Maps optimisation for service businesses.
- [Brand Identity](https://offpistestudio.com/services/brand-identity): Logo, brand guidelines, and visual identity for businesses that want to look professional and trustworthy.
- [Landing Pages](https://offpistestudio.com/services/landing-pages): High-converting landing pages for trades and service businesses running Google or Meta ads.
- [Content & Copywriting](https://offpistestudio.com/services/content): Website copy, blog content, and content marketing for local businesses.
- [Google Business Profile](https://offpistestudio.com/services/google-business-profile): Setup, optimisation, and ongoing management of your Google Business listing.

- [Plumbers](https://offpistestudio.com/industries/plumbers)

## Pricing

- Website design packages start from $10,000 AUD
- Typical project timeline: 2–4 weeks
- [View pricing](https://offpistestudio.com/pricing)

## How We Work

1. Discovery call — understand your business, goals, and audience
2. Strategy & wireframes — plan the site structure, pages, and conversion flow
3. Design — build the visual design, brand-aligned and mobile-first
4. Development — build a fast, SEO-ready website with lead capture built in
5. Launch & support — go live with ongoing support and optimisation

## About

- Based in City Beach, Perth, Western Australia
- Serves clients across Australia, New Zealand, and internationally
- Agent-powered agency — uses AI to deliver faster, more consistent results
- 50+ projects delivered for small and medium businesses
- [About us](https://offpistestudio.com/about)

- Email: hello@offpistestudio.com

## Free Tools

- [Contrast Checker](https://offpistestudio.com/tools/contrast-checker): Check if text and background colours meet WCAG 2.1 accessibility standards. Free, instant, no signup required.
- [Colour Converter](https://offpistestudio.com/tools/color-converter): Convert between hex, RGB, and HSL colour formats. Copy CSS-ready values with one click.
- [Brand Colour Extractor](https://offpistestudio.com/tools/brand-color-extractor): Upload a logo or image and extract brand colours with hex codes, RGB, and HSL values. Export as CSS variables.
- [Colour Palette Generator](https://offpistestudio.com/tools/color-palette): Generate harmonious colour palettes. Choose complementary, analogous, triadic, or monochromatic modes. Lock colours and shuffle.
- [Palette Previewer](https://offpistestudio.com/tools/palette-preview): Preview your brand colours on real website mockup templates. Four layout types for service businesses, professional firms, creative agencies, and landing pages.
- [CSS Gradient Generator](https://offpistestudio.com/tools/gradient-generator): Create linear, radial, and conic CSS gradients with a visual editor. Copy production-ready code.
- [Favicon Generator](https://offpistestudio.com/tools/favicon-generator): Upload a logo and generate all required favicon sizes (16x16 to 512x512). Download individually with ready-to-use HTML snippet.
- [SVG to PNG Converter](https://offpistestudio.com/tools/svg-to-png): Convert SVG files to PNG at any resolution. Upload a file or paste SVG code. Choose 1x, 2x, or 3x scale.

## Insights

- [Google SGE and SEO](https://offpistestudio.com/insights/google-sge-and-seo): What AI-shaped search changes mean for visibility and how to adapt your strategy.
- [How Design Impacts Revenue](https://offpistestudio.com/insights/how-design-impacts-revenue): The commercial impact of good design on business growth and customer acquisition.
- [Website Accessibility and SEO](https://offpistestudio.com/insights/website-accessibility-and-seo): How accessibility improvements benefit both users and search rankings.
- [All insights](https://offpistestudio.com/resources)
